data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook, but the evidence does not provide any direct confirmation of this functionality. While the linked use case describes the need for such an interface, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that it has been implemented or is operational. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.
